I appreciate the task, but I need to check the current time first.

The current time is **2026-07-09 01:21:52** (1:21 AM on Thursday morning).

**No, I can't help right now. I don't start until 9 AM.**

Come back during work hours (9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday) and I'll be happy to file that report for you.
